facebook.caption:
Tourists keep walking past Bếp An Restaurant. Their loss.

4.7 stars. 2,241 reviews. Under $10 a head. On Đường Trần Hưng Đạo, where most visitors never slow down.

This is the kind of place Phu Quoc locals actually eat on a Tuesday night. No resort markup. No tourist-menu pricing. Just real food at real prices.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the plates land at Bếp An Restaurant. Under $10 a person. 4.7 stars from 2,241 people who already know. Now you do too.
